speaker: speaker2
text: I'm not certain . Do you know ?

speaker: speaker1
text: America was discovered by Christopher Columbus in 1492 .

speaker: speaker2
text: In a way that's right . But the Vikings travelled there long beforeColumbus . And what about the Red Indians ?

text: All right . Ask me a question now .

speaker: speaker2
text: Who invented the electric light bulb ?

speaker: speaker1

speaker: speaker2
text: Correct . Now for a harder question . Who will be the first men on Mars ?

speaker: speaker1
